"'''Ghost'''" was a story found in ''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]'', written and illustrated by [[Jan Duursema]].

==Plot summary==
It involves a young [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] attempting to find a lost treasure and encountering the old Jedi [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], who is on the run from [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. Solo later finds out that the treasure is Quinlan's lightsaber.

==Continuity==
A reader asked in the Q&A section of [[Star Wars Insider 99|''Star Wars Insider'' 99]] why Han didn't believe in the Force. This tale was mentioned within the response, but was stated to not be part of continuity.
